title: The King's Epic Adventure 4 Act 1
description:
A Reason to Carry On!! A Totally Depraved Evil Insideous Turn of Events!
     Seeing that his work is done, King Harkinian is taking a nice long comfy vacation from making the world eat his shit at Japan while the Japanese media takes care of everything. However, a nasty suprise comes in and bites him in the bumper, bringing the king to the point of realization! With the King, Snake, Otacon, and now Miyuki back in business, it'll only be a matter of time before an audience member asks what song was used in HUDOSUHDIUDHX!
  Credit goes to DoomZappo for the poop that zelda watches in the beginning: "WHY IS IT SO MEEN.mp4"
